TEXT.source: Amis Wikipedia, article: 新冠肺炎
TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == COVID-19 == Nangan no lifong Cikemi ko Fala' a Midengaay Adada , o miladesay to pasasela'an a midengaay a adada,ona lifong caay ka tomerep na kairaan tahanini, o saadihayay ko mapatayay a lifong nona to'asan. O sa'ayaway a ciadadaay tonini i,o itiraay i Uhan-Si Fupie- Kowan no Congko i 2019 miheca. Tahira i 2022 miheca saka 7 folad saka 22 romi'ad ira ko 5 fois ira ko 670 ofad ko madengaay, 638 ofad ko mapatayay, tahanini matenakay ho kona lifong. kacipinangan no adada Ano ciadada tona lifong i,cifa'edetay, mako'ec, awa ko 'angil, macahacah, caay to ka pakasanek. Na madenga' tahira i kacipinangan no tiring i,1~14 ko romi'ad, cecay no kalitolo caay ka cipinang. O ciadaday tonini a tamdaw i,cikemiaay ko fala'(81%), nahaop ko 14% maroraay pasasela' away ko sanso, nengnengen i lintokin mahapinang ko kaawa no 'icel no fala' a pasasela'.oroma i,cecay cecayay to sela', maseka' ato masetay to ko lalosidan no tatirengan. Mangalefay ko pikali'ang to malitengay, oroma a tamdaw ano maadaadah ira to ikor a pikali'ang to tiring, mangalefay ko kasamo' no lalosidan no tatirengan. Mikakinkiway ano hatini to parecep i tatireng to pisiwar to wakawak no tamdaw. Pidenga' no adada O pidenga nona lifong i, nani ngoso'ay a dinget ato nani ngoyosay a sopa', patina han nano mako'ec, ma'esing, caciyaw ira a ma'efer ko dinget to sopa' to micomod tayra i coscos no pasasela'an, matenak to i tatirengan. ona miterocay a sopa' talacowa caay ka ray ko piteroc i falifalian. nikawrira,ano i ingiday a tamdaw mapadengaay to nona sopa'. O roma sa i,mikapa ko tamdaw to ciadadaay a maamaan tangsol sa a mikapa to niyah a pising, ngoyos midengaay ko matiniay tona lifong, itira i pala'edef hananay a laloma oya pawpaw sanay a ma'efer a adada ano pasasela' kita mihakelong to fali micomod i tatirengan. Cowa kacipinang ko kaadada Ano ciadada to tona lifong i sarakatay a tolo ko romi'ad i kakaay ko pidenga nona lifong, I'ayaw no kacipinangan ato cowa ka cipinang to adada a tamdaw madenga nona lifong, o kafana'an no mikinkiway i, mahaop ko 40%~45% a ciadadaay o cowa ka cipinang to adada a tamdaw. Sapitaker a demak O sapitakeraw tona lifong a demak, kainaneng a misawsaw to kamay, aka ka piingid to tamdaw, lofoen ko ciadadaay to a tamdaw, pafalien ko lalomaan, ano mako'ec pitahepo to ngoyos ato ngoso', aka ka pikapa to pising ano ca ho ka pisawsaw to kamay. itira i kapolongan a kitiraan aka ca ka citamokis, malowanay ko kadenga' no lifong. Tala'ayaway ho ko sapisang'aw to sapitaker a sapaiyo iro mitini,adihayay to ko mapasadakay a sapitaker a sapaiyo,miocor ko sifo no kalokitakit a papicocok(paciwsiya) to matiniay a sapitaker sapaiyo, malowanay to ko cilifongay a tamdaw. O Sapisanga'ay to Tatirengan a Lekatep mipatalahekal a milekal i 2020 miheca saka 1 folad saka 30 romi'ad " o kaletengay a misaikeday a patenak to kacikemi no fala' a lifong" o sasa'imeren a demak no kapolongan i hekal(PHEIC) tona miheca saka 3 folad saka 11 romi'ad mahapinang to ko katenak i hekal. O tapang no Linheko ci Kutolisu sowal saan: ona lifong nani kaherekan no Sakatosa Lalood no Hekal o sakakaay ko kakaleteng a si'ayawen no tamdaw sanay.
S.PHON: == ʦo~ub~viɬ~ɮ-** == naŋan no~u ɾifo~uŋ ʦikəmi ko~u faɾaʡ a miɬ~ɮəŋaaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa , o~u miɾaɬ~ɮəsaj to~u pasasəɾaʡan a miɬ~ɮəŋaaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa,o~una ɾifo~uŋ ʦaaj ka to~umərəp na kairaan taħanini, o~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u mapatajaj a ɾifo~uŋ no~una to~uʡasan. o~u saʡajawaj a ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~unini i,o~u itiraaj i o~u~uħan-si fo~u~upiə- ko~uwan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u i **** miħəʦa. taħira i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u * fo~uis ira ko~u *** o~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮəŋaaj, *** o~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u mapatajaj, taħanini matənakaj ħo~u ko~una ɾifo~uŋ. kaʦipinaŋan no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ano~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~una ɾifo~uŋ i,ʦifaʡəɬ~ɮətaj, mako~uʡəʦ, awa ko~u ʡaŋiɾ, maʦaħaʦaħ, ʦaaj to~u ka pakasanək. na maɬ~ɮəŋaʡ taħira i kaʦipinaŋan no~u tiriŋ i,*~** ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦəʦaj no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u ʦaaj ka ʦipinaŋ. o~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj to~unini a tamɬ~ɮaw i,ʦikəmiaaj ko~u faɾaʡ(**%), naħao~up ko~u **% maro~uraaj pasasəɾaʡ awaj ko~u sanso~u, nəŋnəŋən i ɾinto~ukin maħapinaŋ ko~u kaawa no~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u faɾaʡ a pasasəɾaʡ.o~uro~uma i,ʦəʦaj ʦəʦajaj to~u səɾaʡ, masəkaʡ ato~u masətaj to~u ko~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan no~u tatirəŋan. maŋaɾəfaj ko~u pikaɾiʡaŋ to~u maɾitəŋaj, o~uro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw ano~u maaɬ~ɮaaɬ~ɮaħ ira to~u iko~ur a pikaɾiʡaŋ to~u tiriŋ, maŋaɾəfaj ko~u kasamo~uʡ no~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan no~u tatirəŋan. mikakinkiwaj ano~u ħatini to~u parəʦəp i tatirəŋ to~u pisiwar to~u wakawak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. piɬ~ɮəŋaʡ no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa o~u piɬ~ɮəŋa no~una ɾifo~uŋ i, nani ŋo~uso~uʡaj a ɬ~ɮiŋət ato~u nani ŋo~ujo~usaj a so~upaʡ, patina ħan nano~u mako~uʡəʦ, maʡəsiŋ, ʦaʦijaw ira a maʡəfər ko~u ɬ~ɮiŋət to~u so~upaʡ to~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajra i ʦo~usʦo~us no~u pasasəɾaʡan, matənak to~u i tatirəŋan. o~una mitəro~uʦaj a so~upaʡ taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ka raj ko~u pitəro~uʦ i faɾifaɾian. nikawrira,ano~u i iŋiɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mapaɬ~ɮəŋaaj to~u no~una so~upaʡ. o~u ro~uma sa i,mikapa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a maamaan taŋso~uɾ sa a mikapa to~u nijaħ a pisiŋ, ŋo~ujo~us miɬ~ɮəŋaaj ko~u matiniaj to~una ɾifo~uŋ, itira i paɾaʡəɬ~ɮəf ħananaj a ɾaɾo~uma o~uja pawpaw sanaj a maʡəfər a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ano~u pasasəɾaʡ kita miħakəɾo~uŋ to~u faɾi miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tatirəŋan. ʦo~uwa kaʦipinaŋ ko~u kaaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ano~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u to~una ɾifo~uŋ i sarakataj a to~uɾo~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i kakaaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəŋa no~una ɾifo~uŋ, iʡajaw no~u kaʦipinaŋan ato~u ʦo~uwa ka ʦipinaŋ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a tamɬ~ɮaw maɬ~ɮəŋa no~una ɾifo~uŋ, o~u kafanaʡan no~u mikinkiwaj i, maħao~up ko~u **%~**% a ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj o~u ʦo~uwa ka ʦipinaŋ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a tamɬ~ɮaw. sapitakər a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u sapitakəraw to~una ɾifo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, kainanəŋ a misawsaw to~u kamaj, aka ka piiŋiɬ~ɮ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ɾo~ufo~uən ko~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, pafaɾiən ko~u ɾaɾo~umaan, ano~u mako~uʡəʦ pitaħəpo~u to~u ŋo~ujo~us ato~u ŋo~uso~uʡ, aka ka pikapa to~u pisiŋ ano~u ʦa ħo~u ka pisawsaw to~u kamaj. itira i kapo~uɾo~uŋan a kitiraan aka ʦa ka ʦitamo~ukis, maɾo~uwanaj ko~u kaɬ~ɮəŋaʡ no~u ɾifo~uŋ. taɾaʡajawaj ħo~u ko~u sapisaŋʡaw to~u sapitakər a sapaijo~u iro~u mitini,aɬ~ɮiħajaj to~u ko~u mapasaɬ~ɮakaj a sapitakər a sapaijo~u,mio~uʦo~ur ko~u sifo~u no~u kaɾo~ukitakit a papiʦo~uʦo~uk(paʦiwsija) to~u matiniaj a sapitakər sapaijo~u, maɾo~uwanaj to~u ko~u ʦiɾifo~uŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sapisaŋaʡaj to~u tatirəŋan a ɾəkatəp mipataɾaħəkaɾ a miɾəkaɾ i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ " o~u kaɾətəŋaj a misaikəɬ~ɮaj a patənak to~u kaʦikəmi no~u faɾaʡ a ɾifo~uŋ" o~u sasaʡimərən a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan i ħəkaɾ(pħəiʦ) to~una miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maħapinaŋ to~u ko~u katənak i ħəkaɾ. o~u tapaŋ no~u ɾinħəko~u ʦi ko~u~uto~uɾiso~u~u so~uwaɾ saan: o~una ɾifo~uŋ nani kaħərəkan no~u sakato~usa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ o~u sakakaaj ko~u kakaɾətəŋ a siʡajawən no~u tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj.
S.FORM: == COVID-19 == Nangan no lifong Cikemi ko Fala' a Midengaay Adada , o miladesay to pasasela'an a midengaay a adada,ona lifong caay ka tomerep na kairaan tahanini, o saadihayay ko mapatayay a lifong nona to'asan. O sa'ayaway a ciadadaay tonini i,o itiraay i Uhan-Si Fupie- Kowan no Congko i 2019 miheca. Tahira i 2022 miheca saka 7 folad saka 22 romi'ad ira ko 5 fois ira ko 670 ofad ko madengaay, 638 ofad ko mapatayay, tahanini matenakay ho kona lifong. kacipinangan no adada Ano ciadada tona lifong i,cifa'edetay, mako'ec, awa ko 'angil, macahacah, caay to ka pakasanek. Na madenga' tahira i kacipinangan no tiring i,1~14 ko romi'ad, cecay no kalitolo caay ka cipinang. O ciadaday tonini a tamdaw i,cikemiaay ko fala'(81%), nahaop ko 14% maroraay pasasela' away ko sanso, nengnengen i lintokin mahapinang ko kaawa no 'icel no fala' a pasasela'.oroma i,cecay cecayay to sela', maseka' ato masetay to ko lalosidan no tatirengan. Mangalefay ko pikali'ang to malitengay, oroma a tamdaw ano maadaadah ira to ikor a pikali'ang to tiring, mangalefay ko kasamo' no lalosidan no tatirengan. Mikakinkiway ano hatini to parecep i tatireng to pisiwar to wakawak no tamdaw. Pidenga' no adada O pidenga nona lifong i, nani ngoso'ay a dinget ato nani ngoyosay a sopa', patina han nano mako'ec, ma'esing, caciyaw ira a ma'efer ko dinget to sopa' to micomod tayra i coscos no pasasela'an, matenak to i tatirengan. ona miterocay a sopa' talacowa caay ka ray ko piteroc i falifalian. nikawrira,ano i ingiday a tamdaw mapadengaay to nona sopa'. O roma sa i,mikapa ko tamdaw to ciadadaay a maamaan tangsol sa a mikapa to niyah a pising, ngoyos midengaay ko matiniay tona lifong, itira i pala'edef hananay a laloma oya pawpaw sanay a ma'efer a adada ano pasasela' kita mihakelong to fali micomod i tatirengan. Cowa kacipinang ko kaadada Ano ciadada to tona lifong i sarakatay a tolo ko romi'ad i kakaay ko pidenga nona lifong, I'ayaw no kacipinangan ato cowa ka cipinang to adada a tamdaw madenga nona lifong, o kafana'an no mikinkiway i, mahaop ko 40%~45% a ciadadaay o cowa ka cipinang to adada a tamdaw. Sapitaker a demak O sapitakeraw tona lifong a demak, kainaneng a misawsaw to kamay, aka ka piingid to tamdaw, lofoen ko ciadadaay to a tamdaw, pafalien ko lalomaan, ano mako'ec pitahepo to ngoyos ato ngoso', aka ka pikapa to pising ano ca ho ka pisawsaw to kamay. itira i kapolongan a kitiraan aka ca ka citamokis, malowanay ko kadenga' no lifong. Tala'ayaway ho ko sapisang'aw to sapitaker a sapaiyo iro mitini,adihayay to ko mapasadakay a sapitaker a sapaiyo,miocor ko sifo no kalokitakit a papicocok(paciwsiya) to matiniay a sapitaker sapaiyo, malowanay to ko cilifongay a tamdaw. O Sapisanga'ay to Tatirengan a Lekatep mipatalahekal a milekal i 2020 miheca saka 1 folad saka 30 romi'ad " o kaletengay a misaikeday a patenak to kacikemi no fala' a lifong" o sasa'imeren a demak no kapolongan i hekal(PHEIC) tona miheca saka 3 folad saka 11 romi'ad mahapinang to ko katenak i hekal. O tapang no Linheko ci Kutolisu sowal saan: ona lifong nani kaherekan no Sakatosa Lalood no Hekal o sakakaay ko kakaleteng a si'ayawen no tamdaw sanay.
S.PHON: == ʦo~ub~viɬ~ɮ-** == naŋan no~u ɾifo~uŋ ʦikəmi ko~u faɾaʡ a miɬ~ɮəŋaaj aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa , o~u miɾaɬ~ɮəsaj to~u pasasəɾaʡan a miɬ~ɮəŋaaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa,o~una ɾifo~uŋ ʦaaj ka to~umərəp na kairaan taħanini, o~u saaɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u mapatajaj a ɾifo~uŋ no~una to~uʡasan. o~u saʡajawaj a ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~unini i,o~u itiraaj i o~u~uħan-si fo~u~upiə- ko~uwan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u i **** miħəʦa. taħira i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u * fo~uis ira ko~u *** o~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u maɬ~ɮəŋaaj, *** o~ufaɬ~ɮ ko~u mapatajaj, taħanini matənakaj ħo~u ko~una ɾifo~uŋ. kaʦipinaŋan no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ano~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~una ɾifo~uŋ i,ʦifaʡəɬ~ɮətaj, mako~uʡəʦ, awa ko~u ʡaŋiɾ, maʦaħaʦaħ, ʦaaj to~u ka pakasanək. na maɬ~ɮəŋaʡ taħira i kaʦipinaŋan no~u tiriŋ i,*~** ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ʦəʦaj no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u ʦaaj ka ʦipinaŋ. o~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaj to~unini a tamɬ~ɮaw i,ʦikəmiaaj ko~u faɾaʡ(**%), naħao~up ko~u **% maro~uraaj pasasəɾaʡ awaj ko~u sanso~u, nəŋnəŋən i ɾinto~ukin maħapinaŋ ko~u kaawa no~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u faɾaʡ a pasasəɾaʡ.o~uro~uma i,ʦəʦaj ʦəʦajaj to~u səɾaʡ, masəkaʡ ato~u masətaj to~u ko~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan no~u tatirəŋan. maŋaɾəfaj ko~u pikaɾiʡaŋ to~u maɾitəŋaj, o~uro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw ano~u maaɬ~ɮaaɬ~ɮaħ ira to~u iko~ur a pikaɾiʡaŋ to~u tiriŋ, maŋaɾəfaj ko~u kasamo~uʡ no~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan no~u tatirəŋan. mikakinkiwaj ano~u ħatini to~u parəʦəp i tatirəŋ to~u pisiwar to~u wakawak no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. piɬ~ɮəŋaʡ no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa o~u piɬ~ɮəŋa no~una ɾifo~uŋ i, nani ŋo~uso~uʡaj a ɬ~ɮiŋət ato~u nani ŋo~ujo~usaj a so~upaʡ, patina ħan nano~u mako~uʡəʦ, maʡəsiŋ, ʦaʦijaw ira a maʡəfər ko~u ɬ~ɮiŋət to~u so~upaʡ to~u miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ tajra i ʦo~usʦo~us no~u pasasəɾaʡan, matənak to~u i tatirəŋan. o~una mitəro~uʦaj a so~upaʡ taɾaʦo~uwa ʦaaj ka raj ko~u pitəro~uʦ i faɾifaɾian. nikawrira,ano~u i iŋiɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mapaɬ~ɮəŋaaj to~u no~una so~upaʡ. o~u ro~uma sa i,mikapa ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw to~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj a maamaan taŋso~uɾ sa a mikapa to~u nijaħ a pisiŋ, ŋo~ujo~us miɬ~ɮəŋaaj ko~u matiniaj to~una ɾifo~uŋ, itira i paɾaʡəɬ~ɮəf ħananaj a ɾaɾo~uma o~uja pawpaw sanaj a maʡəfər a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ano~u pasasəɾaʡ kita miħakəɾo~uŋ to~u faɾi miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tatirəŋan. ʦo~uwa kaʦipinaŋ ko~u kaaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ano~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~u to~una ɾifo~uŋ i sarakataj a to~uɾo~u ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i kakaaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəŋa no~una ɾifo~uŋ, iʡajaw no~u kaʦipinaŋan ato~u ʦo~uwa ka ʦipinaŋ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a tamɬ~ɮaw maɬ~ɮəŋa no~una ɾifo~uŋ, o~u kafanaʡan no~u mikinkiwaj i, maħao~up ko~u **%~**% a ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj o~u ʦo~uwa ka ʦipinaŋ to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa a tamɬ~ɮaw. sapitakər a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u sapitakəraw to~una ɾifo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak, kainanəŋ a misawsaw to~u kamaj, aka ka piiŋiɬ~ɮ to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ɾo~ufo~uən ko~u ʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj to~u a tamɬ~ɮaw, pafaɾiən ko~u ɾaɾo~umaan, ano~u mako~uʡəʦ pitaħəpo~u to~u ŋo~ujo~us ato~u ŋo~uso~uʡ, aka ka pikapa to~u pisiŋ ano~u ʦa ħo~u ka pisawsaw to~u kamaj. itira i kapo~uɾo~uŋan a kitiraan aka ʦa ka ʦitamo~ukis, maɾo~uwanaj ko~u kaɬ~ɮəŋaʡ no~u ɾifo~uŋ. taɾaʡajawaj ħo~u ko~u sapisaŋʡaw to~u sapitakər a sapaijo~u iro~u mitini,aɬ~ɮiħajaj to~u ko~u mapasaɬ~ɮakaj a sapitakər a sapaijo~u,mio~uʦo~ur ko~u sifo~u no~u kaɾo~ukitakit a papiʦo~uʦo~uk(paʦiwsija) to~u matiniaj a sapitakər sapaijo~u, maɾo~uwanaj to~u ko~u ʦiɾifo~uŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sapisaŋaʡaj to~u tatirəŋan a ɾəkatəp mipataɾaħəkaɾ a miɾəkaɾ i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ " o~u kaɾətəŋaj a misaikəɬ~ɮaj a patənak to~u kaʦikəmi no~u faɾaʡ a ɾifo~uŋ" o~u sasaʡimərən a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan i ħəkaɾ(pħəiʦ) to~una miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maħapinaŋ to~u ko~u katənak i ħəkaɾ. o~u tapaŋ no~u ɾinħəko~u ʦi ko~u~uto~uɾiso~u~u so~uwaɾ saan: o~una ɾifo~uŋ nani kaħərəkan no~u sakato~usa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u ħəkaɾ o~u sakakaaj ko~u kakaɾətəŋ a siʡajawən no~u tamɬ~ɮaw sanaj.
